# Company Overview

Canary Holdings Corporation is a leading provider of security solutions.

The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.

Our executive team is led by CEO Eleanor Testperson.

## Business Segments

Canary Holdings operates through three business segments:
- CanaryShield 9000 Security Systems
- Corporate Security Consulting
- Digital Protection Services

## Financial Highlights (CHC)

For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024, Canary Holdings Corporation (NYSE: CHC)
reported the following results:

| Metric | 2024 | 2023 |
|--------|------|------|
| Revenue | $1.2B | $1.1B |
| Net Income | $180M | $165M |
| Employees | 5,000 | 4,800 |

Eleanor Testperson, CEO of Canary Holdings Corporation, stated:
"The CanaryShield 9000 platform continues to drive our growth."
